helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow hot [options]

Hot Stack Overflow questions

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Output columns: title, score, answers, url

payload.title: How to develop the APO driver for USB audio devices in Windows?
looking for embedded webrtc solution for ip camera?
In Django, where to define user
swiftui state based view switching isn't switching

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow search [options] <query>

Search Stack Overflow questions

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command
